title: Taekwondo Legends
logline: After leaving a toxic, money-driven school that cares only about the bottom line and their image, Ethan Hyun and five teammates rebuild under Master Viet at Kwon's Taekwondo Academy. Together they chase an impossible dream: qualifying for the Korea U20 National Team.
story_premise: Ethan walks into Kwon's Taekwondo Academy with elite technique, a silver letter black belt and scars from an old school. Master Viet doesn't promise miracles - he promises attention. One by one, five friends leave Prime Taekwondo Sports Dynasty's shadow to follow Ethan.
story_premise_2: The rivalry stays on the tournament floor — rival schools, national camps, and the long road to Korea. At Kwon's, teammates push each other harder; they don't tear each other down.

characters.role: Main Character · The Gifted Broken Prodigy

skills.name: Ultimate Counter
skills.detail: unlocked **Arc 7 Ch 92** (U20 camp). Reads any committed attack; answers with **spinning hook to head** while **guard stays up**. First competitive use: **Ch 98** vs Min-ho.

skills.name: Mountain Strike
skills.detail: unlocked **Arc 7 Ch 93** (U20 camp). Heavy **mat stomp** breaks opponent rhythm → **cut kick to head** (+3). Rhythm weapon, not a illegal strike.

skills.name: Whirling Dervish
skills.detail: unlocked **Arc 7 Ch 93** (U20 camp). **10-hit** body/head combination with spins between strikes. **Legal in tournament:** up to **3 consecutive kicks** before the foot must plant — chain runs **3+3+3+1** with resets between groups.
